overall.description: First-person driving footage from Cyberpunk 2077, traveling through a foggy elevated highway lined with massive digital billboards and industrial electrical infrastructure. The scene features heavy atmospheric fog, neon-lit holographic advertisements, and futuristic urban decay.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway approach in dense fog

events.description: glowing digital billboards become visible through the fog ahead

agents.ego_description: driving on elevated highway through dense fog, approaching illuminated structures

entered.detail: asphalt road surface with lane markings visible through fog
metal highway guardrail running along the left edge
metal highway guardrail running along the right edge
large concrete overpass or highway support structure looming in the fog

segments.scene_description: The vehicle travels along an elevated highway enveloped in thick fog. Metal guardrails line both sides of the asphalt road, while massive concrete support structures fade into the mist ahead. The glow of digital billboards begins to pierce through the fog in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: digital billboard corridor with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering the corridor of massive digital billboards on both sides of the highway
passing large holographic advertisements displaying various products in teal and orange

agents.ego_description: cruising through the billboard corridor at moderate speed, surrounded by glowing digital advertisements on both sides

entered.detail: massive vertical digital screen displaying animated holographic advertisements
massive vertical digital screen displaying animated holographic advertisements
thick concrete pillar supporting the highway structure

segments.scene_description: The highway enters a canyon of massive digital billboards displaying bright holographic advertisements in teal and orange hues. The fog diffuses the neon light, creating an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere. Concrete support pillars occasionally pass by as the vehicle maintains a steady course.

events.description: exiting the digital billboard corridor, returning to open foggy highway
highway curves gently while maintaining elevation through the fog

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated highway as the billboards fade into the fog behind, navigating a gentle curve

entered.detail: highway overpass structure visible through the fog ahead

segments.scene_description: Leaving the billboard corridor behind, the highway continues through dense fog with only the guardrails and distant overpass structures visible. The environment transitions back to industrial infrastructure as the vehicle navigates a gentle curve.

events.description: entering industrial zone with prominent power lines and electrical towers on the right
passing road signage and barriers along the highway edge

agents.ego_description: navigating through the industrial highway section with power transmission towers visible on the right side

entered.detail: tall metal lattice tower supporting high-voltage electrical cables
thick power lines stretching between transmission towers
road signs and directional markers along the highway edge

segments.scene_description: The highway enters an industrial area characterized by tall power line towers and electrical infrastructure on the right side. The fog persists as the vehicle continues along the elevated road, passing road signage and metal barriers.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from a desolate fog into a neon-lit corridor before returning to a stark industrial landscape. It begins with the vehicle moving through thick mist where concrete supports and metal guardrails are barely visible, until the distant glow of digital billboards begins to pierce the haze. As the camera enters a canyon of massive holographic advertisements, the fog diffuses bright teal and orange hues into an immersive cyberpunk atmosphere. The scene then shifts back into dense fog as the billboard corridor recedes, leaving only the road and distant overpasses visible while the vehicle navigates a gentle curve. Finally, the environment opens into an industrial zone characterized by tall power line towers and electrical infrastructure that line the road under a persistent gray shroud.
